mnemonics: Split the pie, lose the deal
keyPoints: The Ultimatum Game is a classic game theory experiment
The proposal is made by one player to the other
The proposer splits the pie into two parts, one for themselves and one for the responder
The responder can either accept or reject the proposal
If the responder rejects, both players get nothing
If the responder accepts, the responder gets less than half of the pie
The game is often used to study fairness, cooperation, and decision-making
